---
title: "Week 3 - May 26"
author: "Colin Madland"
date: "2026-05-27"
categories: [summer 2026, plugin, WordPress, audio]
image: "audio.png"
image-alt: "plugin in WordPress called ALT Lab Audiography"
license: CC-BY
bibliography: ../../refs.bib
bibliographystyle: apa
---

Super quick update...

## ALT Lab Audiography

I just discovered that there is a plugin in your opened.ca site called 'ALT Lab Audiography', which seems to allow you to annotate audio files directly in WordPress.

I have never used this plugin, but you may want to try it out.

![ALT Lab Audiography Plugin](audio.png){fig-alt="plugin in WordPress called ALT Lab Audiography"}

## Activation

Navigate to your Dashboard > Plugins, then click 'Activate' on the plugin.
